---
title: "![Julia](Material/Julia.svg)"
subtitle: "Introducción a Julia"

format:
    html: 
        output-file: 01-Intro-apuntes.html
    clean-revealjs:
        output-file: 01-Intro-diapositivas.html
---

{{< include _theme/activate.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-Introduccion/porque.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-Introduccion/instalacion.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-Introduccion/repl.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-Introduccion/ides.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-Introduccion/intro-paquetes.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-Introduccion/variables.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-Introduccion/control-flujo.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-Introduccion/vectores.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-Introduccion/otros-tipos.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-Introduccion/funciones.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-Introduccion/errores.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-Introduccion/macros.qmd >}}
